title: Lava-Tunnel Vault: Cooling-Corridor Placement
strategies: trivial: upgrade nothing -> reproduces the checker do-nothing baseline (Ratio ~ 0.1)
greedy blanket: spend the whole budget tiling a Manhattan disk around the highest-power sources; lowers the local gradient but leaves the long escape path intact, so deep sources barely cool

series-circuit insight: build contiguous high-conductivity CORRIDORS along the shortest open path from each hot source to its nearest vent, funding sources by power*path-length; collapses the dominant series resistance
minimax budget allocation: with a budget too small to corridor every source, iteratively fund the source that currently sets the maximum temperature (open-ended, no clean optimum)
